display.purpose: Hero product name, single-use per page.

title.purpose: Card titles, feature names, tool headings.

label.purpose: Eyebrow labels, section kickers, uppercase metadata.

mono.purpose: Terminal output, code blocks, data tables.

shadows.name: glow-shadow
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA and hero accent. One per view.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: All state changes: hover, focus, active, disabled.

motion.name: entrance-fade
motion.purpose: Initial page entrance animation, fade-up only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action per view. Solid Blueprint Blue fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.72 0.16 250); color: oklch(0.14 0.02 260); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.78 0.18 250); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.55 0.18 250); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.72 0.16 250); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action alongside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.98 0.005 260); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 15%); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(1 0 0 / 5%); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.72 0.16 250); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-importance action in toolbars and panels.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.70 0.02 260); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.22 0.03 260); color: oklch(0.98 0.005 260); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.72 0.16 250); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Default content card with surface-raised background.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.18 0.025 260); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 8%); border-radius: 0.75rem; box-shadow: 0 8px 40px -12px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.6); transition: box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-card-content { padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-interactive:hover { box-shadow: 0 12px 48px -16px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.7); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Default text input for forms and search.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.18 0.025 260); color: oklch(0.98 0.005 260); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 12%); transition: box-shadow 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.72 0.16 250); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.72 0.16 250); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.70 0.02 260); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: oklch(0.65 0.24 25); }

components.name: Code Block
components.css: .ds-code-block { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; background: oklch(0.22 0.03 260); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 8%); border-radius: 0.75rem; overflow: hidden; } .ds-code-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 8%); background: oklch(0.14 0.02 260 / 0.5); font-size: 0.6875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: oklch(0.70 0.02 260); } .ds-code-header button { background: none; border: none; color: oklch(0.70 0.02 260); cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; } .ds-code-header button:hover { color: oklch(0.98 0.005 260); } .ds-code-pre { padding: 1rem; margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.85 0.20 145); overflow-x: auto; }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.html:
PPacificaPilot
FeaturesToolsInstall
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 4rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; max-width: 80rem; margin: 0 auto; background: oklch(0.14 0.02 260 / 0.6); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 5%); } .ds-nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; color: oklch(0.98 0.005 260); text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-mark { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 2rem; height: 2rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.72 0.16 250); color: oklch(0.14 0.02 260); font-weight: 900; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; } .ds-nav-links a { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.70 0.02 260); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: oklch(0.98 0.005 260); }

narrative.overview:
A command center dashboard for algorithmic trading — dense, authoritative, and quietly illuminated. Every element exists because it carries information or enables an action. The interface should feel like the bridge of a ship at night: lots of data, calm voices, controlled lighting. Trust is earned through clarity, not visual warmth.

This system rejects everything that reads as consumer crypto — rainbow gradients, glass panels, glossy buttons, animated mascots, or copy that talks about "boosting" anything. The primary reference is Bloomberg Terminal crossed with a well-designed terminal emulator: sharp typography, semantic color, information density without noise.
keyCharacteristics: Dark surface with controlled, semantic accent lighting
Single type family across all UI (Inter), with JetBrains Mono reserved for data and code
Information density is encouraged; every pixel must earn its place
Color is semantic, not decorative — blue for interactive, red for destructive, green for confirmation
Corners are gently radiused (0.5–0.75rem), never pill-shaped or clown-round
Motion is brief (150–250ms) and signals state, never personality
Shadows create surface hierarchy, not atmosphere

rules.name: The One-Hue Rule
rules.body: The system speaks in one accent hue: blue at 250°. There is no secondary accent hue.

rules.name: The Terminal Green Rule
rules.body: oklch(0.85 0.20 145) is the only green. It signals favorable numeric conditions, not emotional happiness.

rules.name: The Single Scale Rule
rules.body: One family (Inter) serves all prose roles. Only technical/code content switches to JetBrains Mono.

rules.name: The Quiet Ground Rule
rules.body: The base surface is never shadowed. The base is the ground plane.

rules.name: The Blue Glow Rule
rules.body: The glow shadow is never applied to more than one element at a time.

dos: Use Blueprint Blue for exactly one primary action per view. Everything else gets outline or ghost.
Use the three-surface hierarchy: Surface Dark (base), Surface Raised (card), Surface Mid (hover/panel). Never invent a fourth.
Keep body text at Ink White (0.98 lightness) against the background — the contrast is deliberate and non-negotiable.
Use JetBrains Mono for any text where character alignment matters: commands, trading data, code blocks, table columns.
Use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 and text-wrap: pretty on prose paragraphs.
Use 150–200ms transitions for all state changes (hover, focus, active). Users are in a task; motion must not slow them down.
Use cursor-pointer on all interactive elements, cursor-not-allowed on disabled ones.
donts: Don't use purple or rainbow gradients anywhere. The palette has one accent hue (blue, 250°).
Don't use glassmorphism, frosted panels, or backdrop-filter: blur() on content surfaces.
Don't use pill-shaped buttons or border-radius over 0.75rem on any interactive element.
Don't animate the hero, add particle backgrounds, or use floating/parallax decorative elements.
Don't use "10x" "supercharge" "boost" "game-changing" or any crypto-marketing language in the UI.
Don't use bright multi-color buttons on the dark background. All buttons use surface-aware color assignments.
Don't write skeleton loaders everywhere. Prefer minimal inline loading or none for data-heavy screens.
Don't use border-left or border-right as a colored accent stripe on any component.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient for decorative text emphasis.
Don't use numbered section markers (01, 02, 03) above every section.
Don't add empty states that say "nothing here" — teach the interface instead.
